headline: FactSet (FDS) Stock Valuation After Steady Guidance And Recurring Revenue Strength
summary: FactSet Research Systems (FDS) is back in focus after its latest quarter delivered revenue slightly ahead of estimates and reaffirmed full year EPS guidance, while investors weigh slower growth against recurring revenue strength and a likely dividend increase. See our latest analysis for FactSet Research Systems. At a share price of US$241.16, FactSet has bounced with a 13.44% 1 month share price return and 16.24% 3 month share price return, yet the total shareholder return over 1 year is...
